𝗪𝗛𝗜𝗦𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗫 | To provide highly accurate, fast, and detailed speech-to-text transcriptions with precise word-level timing and speaker identification for audio and video content.  🌟 Rising Fast!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide highly accurate, fast, and detailed speech-to-text transcriptions with precise word-level timing and speaker identification for audio and video content.
📅 Created: Dec 2022 • Updated: May 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ 70x realtime transcription using faster-whisper
✅ Accurate word-level timestamps via wav2vec2 alignment
✅ Multispeaker ASR with speaker diarization from pyannote-audio
✅ VAD preprocessing for reduced hallucination and batching without WER degradation
✅ Low GPU memory requirement (<8GB for large-v2)


✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 21.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2.3K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 171 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

WhisperX is a Python-based Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system that enhances OpenAI's Whisper model by providing accurate word-level timestamps and speaker diarization. It leverages faster-whisper for efficient inference, wav2vec2 for alignment, and pyannote-audio for speaker identification, enabling fast, multi-speaker transcription with improved accuracy.

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/m-bain/whisperX

𝗗𝗢𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗥-𝗦𝗧𝗘𝗔𝗠-𝗛𝗘𝗔𝗗𝗟𝗘𝗦𝗦 | To easily deploy and run a headless Steam instance within a Docker container for remote game streaming and access.  🔥 Super Hot!

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To easily deploy and run a headless Steam instance within a Docker container for remote game streaming and access.
📅 Created: Jan 2022 • Updated: May 2026

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Headless Steam Client with Proton support
✅ Moonlight compatible server
✅ Web UI with noVNC for browser access
✅ NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel GPU support
✅ Easy installation of EmeDeck, Heroic, and Lutris via Flatpak
✅ Full controller support
✅ Support for Flatpak and Appimage installation
✅ Debian Trixie base


◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 205 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 82 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides a Docker image for a headless Steam client, enabling remote game streaming. It supports NVIDIA GPU acceleration, web-based access via noVNC, and compatibility with Steam Link, Moonlight, and other game launchers.

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗙𝗥𝗘𝗘-𝗟𝗟𝗠-𝗔𝗣𝗜-𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗖𝗘𝗦 | To discover and utilize free API endpoints for various Large Language Models, enabling developers to experiment with and integrate LLM functionalities without incurring costs.  🌟 Rising Fast!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To discover and utilize free API endpoints for various Large Language Models, enabling developers to experiment with and integrate LLM functionalities without incurring costs.
📅 Created: Jul 2024 • Updated: May 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Lists free LLM inference resources accessible via API
✅ Categorizes providers into 'Free Providers' and 'Providers with trial credits'
✅ Details limits and available models for each provider
✅ Excludes illegitimate or reverse-engineered services


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 20.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2.1K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 14 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository serves as a curated list of free API resources for accessing various Large Language Models (LLMs). It aims to provide developers with readily available, cost-free options for integrating LLM capabilities into their applications, including models from major providers and open-source alternatives.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗠𝗢𝗡𝗧𝗬 | Safely executing AI-generated Python code within an agent or application, providing a controlled and efficient sandbox.  🔥 Super Hot!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Safely executing AI-generated Python code within an agent or application, providing a controlled and efficient sandbox.
📅 Created: May 2023 • Updated: May 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Minimal and secure Python interpreter in Rust
✅ Fast startup times (<1μs)
✅ Controlled execution with resource limits (memory, stack, time)
✅ Blocks host environment access (filesystem, env, network) by default
✅ Allows controlled external function calls
✅ Supports type checking with included `ty`
✅ Snapshotting interpreter state
✅ Cross-language compatibility (Rust, Python, Javascript)
✅ Collects stdout and stderr
✅ Supports async/sync host calls
✅ Limited standard library subset


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 311 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 59 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Monty is a minimal and secure Python interpreter written in Rust, designed to safely execute Python code generated by AI agents. It offers fast startup times and controlled execution, avoiding the overhead of containerized sandboxes.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/pydantic/monty

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Shannon Lite is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes source code to identify potential attack vectors and then executes real exploits to validate vulnerabilities before they reach production, providing reproducible proof-of-concept exploits.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
